name: farm_soil_ai_credit_denial_drought_proxy
premise: A farm cooperative uses an AI credit model to approve low-interest loans for drought resilience upgrades. The model denies a cluster of small farms after using satellite soil moisture as a feature, but a sensor malfunction during a heat wave made the region appear worse than it is. Cooperative director Elise Morano can override the model for the affected farms, risking default if the drought worsens, or follow the model to protect the fund and offer only high-interest loans. Farmers argue the denial will force them to sell land to large agribusinesses, accelerating consolidation. Regulators are watching for discrimination and the co-op promised 'transparent, fair credit' in its charter. The planting window closes in two weeks.

agents.name: Elise Morano
agents.identity: I am the cooperative director responsible for credit decisions when models can misread environmental data and change who survives a crisis.
agents.goal: I want resilience investments to reach the farms that need them without gambling the entire fund on errors or political pressure.

agents.name: Rancher Dana Whitfield
agents.identity: I am a small producer seeking a resilience loan and representing neighbors who fear the model is turning measurement error into permanent exclusion.
agents.goal: I want an override and audit process so small farms are not wiped out by a black-box denial during a narrow seasonal window.

choices: I will override denials temporarily and commission an independent audit of the soil feature with tighter verification, accepting some default risk to prevent consolidation driven by sensor error.
I will follow the model and offer only higher-interest products while investigating, accepting that some farms may fail to protect the fund's solvency and future lending capacity.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The planting window is closing and the model denial may be wrong. Elise Morano must choose between overriding to protect small farms now or following the model to protect the fund while investigating. What does Elise Morano do?
